Video.summary: Star Eydie Gorme shares a hospital room. Also, Tim plays a man whose houseplant hates him, and The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Premiere guest stars Jim Nabors! Includes Tim Conway as a soldier, and Jim dropping in on "The Family."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi joins Carol, Burt Reynolds shows up for Q&A, and John Davidson salutes classic movies from MGM.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Image.alt: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard and Tim Conway appear on the game show spoof "The Dater's Game".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Kay Ballard

Video.summary: Guest star Nancy Dussault sings, while Mr. Tudball finds himself regretting his offer to pay for a funeral.
Video.title: Nancy Dussault

Video.summary: George Gobel joins Carol in a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess living in squalor in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, George Gobel

Video.summary: Michele Lee headlines a wonderful production number, which also offers a visit with the 10th Street Family.
Video.title: Michele Lee

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife obsessed with celebrity gossip. Then, a take-off on a classic with "Rebecky."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: The season finale features Carol putting the cast on the spot for Q&A, as well as beloved recurring sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars, spoofing "Love In An Avalanche," which makes way for a more tropically based number.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Donald O'Connor star. Featuring a housewife plagued by ads and a spoof of "College Musical."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson guest star, highlighted by the stirring saga So Proudly We Heal.
Video.title: Debbie Reynolds, John Davidson

Video.summary: John Byner & Helen Reddy join Carol in a sketch about swingers. Also, The Family plays a game of "Sorry!"
Video.title: John Byner, Helen Reddy

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Phil Silvers & Jean Stapleton guest! Features "The Old Folks", commercial parodies, and a musical number.
Video.title: Phil Silvers, Jean Stapleton

Video.summary: Joan Rivers kills with her comedy set, while The Old Folks and the 10th Avenue Family appear in sketches.
Video.title: Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson joins the Q&A. Sketches include "Carol & Sis" where the Bradfords discourage an operator.
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Jack Klugman & Tony Randall guest. Jack sings with Carol, while Tony appears in a tribute to Broadway sketch.
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars! Includes Roddy joining "The Family" for a reunion, and a "Brief Encounter."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests! Featuring an improv comedy performance.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: George Chakiris and Shirley Jones guest. Chakiris joins for Q&A, while Jones is a secretary in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Paul Sand guest. Paul plays a man seeking confidence, and Steve joins "The Putrified Forest."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Scoey Mitchell is Carol's guest. Featuring "The Queen Elizabeth Show", a Q&A and a "Queen & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray join commercial outtakes! "Carol & Sis" finds Carol filling in for a secretary.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers
